name: Barbell Back Squat
resistance_profile: Hardest near the bottom (deep knee/hip flexion), loading the quads at long length.
rom_notes: Squat to at least parallel; deeper increases quad and glute stretch if mobility allows.
cues: Sit between the hips, knees track over toes
Drive the floor away out of the hole
common_errors: Losing the brace and rounding under load
